SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Class BaseConfigCache

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.BaseConfigCache
public class BaseConfigCache extends Object
Caches the base input config for a given classpath digest. This allows to reuse the base input config across multiple proof runs, as long as the classpath does not change. The bootclasspath is also taken into account for the digest -- but the builtin REDUX classes are not digested as not needed. This is only used in ProblemInitializer.createInitConfigFor(EnvInput).
See Also:
  • ProblemInitializer

  • Method Details

    • computeClasspathDigest

      public static @Nullable String computeClasspathDigest(@NonNull EnvInput envInput)
      Computes a digest for the classpath in the given environment input. This includes both the classpath and the bootclasspath, but does not read the builtin REDUX classes. This allows reusing the cached config across multiple proof runs, as long as the classpath does not change. The digest is computed by hashing the content of all files in the classpath and the bootclasspath (if present). The order of the files does not matter, as they are sorted before hashing. If both classpath and bootclasspath are empty, a special value is returned.
      Parameters:
      envInput - the environment input to read the classpath from
      Returns:
      the computed digest, or null if an error occurred while reading the classpath

    • matchesCachedConfig

      public static boolean matchesCachedConfig(Profile profile, String inputDigest)

    • getBaseInputConfig

      public static @NonNull InitConfig getBaseInputConfig()
      Returns the cached base input config. This should only be called if matchesCachedConfig(Profile, String) returns true.
      Returns:
      the cached base input config
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if no cached config is available

    • setBaseInputConfig

      public static void setBaseInputConfig(@NonNull InitConfig config, String inputDigest)
      Update the cache with the given config and input digest. Config and digest *must* be consistent with each other, i.e., the digest must be the result of calling computeClasspathDigest(EnvInput) on an environment input that would lead to the given config.
      Parameters:
      config - the config to cache
      inputDigest - the digest of the classpath of config.

    • reset

      public static void reset()
